docs.text: Lightnovel 天穹对偶介绍 关于天穹对偶的介绍 共形场论讲义 以一维共形场论为例介绍带有整体共形对称性 \(SO(d+1,1)\) 的共形场论。 Materials on CFT: Euclidean, Lorentzian, celestial, Carrollian, ... (0%) empty page Introduction to cosmological bootstrap Uncollected/uncorrected 临时工作台 Terminologies In this and related pages, the following terminologies are adopted without further specification: Term Meaning Virasoro CFT CFT with Virasoro symmetry on \(\R^{1,1}\) or \(\R^{2}\) (Euclidean) CFT CFT with \(SO(d+1,1)\) 1 symmetry on \(\R^{d}\) Lorentzian CFT 2 CFT with \(\wave{SO}(d,2)\) symmetry on \(\R^{d-1,1}\) Virasoro primary/descendant vectors in highest weight representations of Virasoro algebra primary/descendant vectors in highest weight representations of \(\solie(d+2,\C)\) (Euclidean) principal series certain types pf representations of \(SO(d+1,1)\) Lorentzian principal series certain types pf representations of \(\wave{SO}(d,2)\) BPZ/Lorentzian conjugation $Q_{L}^{\dagger}=-Q_{L}\, \implies\, D^{\dagger}=D,\, P^{\dagger}=K,\dots $ dS/Euclidean conjugation $Q_{E}^{\dagger}=-Q_{E}\, \implies\, D^{\dagger}=-D,\, P^{\dagger}=-P,\dots $ The local operators on \(\R^{d}\) and \(\R^{d-1,1}\) are distinguished by \(\op_{E}(x)\) and \(\op_{L}(x)\) if necessary, and \(\op_{i}\) 's denote \(\op_{i}(0)\) or \(\op_{i}(x_{i})\) according to the context. External links or it's double cover \(\spin(d+1,1)\) . ↩ Does Kreinian CFT make sense? ↩

docs.text: Hotkey References: AutoHotkey 中文文档 Karabiner-Elements Documentation Win: AutoHotkey Mac: Karabiner Karabiner 可以复现 AutoHotkey 的一部分功能。配置文件的格式为 JSON，其目录为 ~/.config/karabiner/assets/complex_modifications/xxx.json 配置文件 xxx.json 的结构为 { "title" : "test shortcuts" , "rules" : [ ... ] } 数组 rules 存储了单个快捷键的配置信息，其结构如下。 from 为快捷键以及修饰键， to 为激活的一系列按键或其它事件。 { "description" : "..." , "manipulators" : [ { "type" : "basic" , "from" : { ... }, "to" : [ ... ], } } ... ] 例如，右 option 键加删除键实现向后删除的方案如下。键名可用 Karabiner 自带的 EventViewer 查看。 { "description" : "right_option + del : del_forward" , "manipulators" : [ { "type" : "basic" , "from" : { "key_code" : "delete_or_backspace" , "modifiers" : { "mandatory" : [ "right_option" ] } }, "to" : [ { "key_code" : "delete_forward" } ] } ] }, Karabiner 不具有类似于 AutoHotkey Send/SendRaw 的函数，可以通过剪切板实现类似的功能，例如 LaTeX 的行间公式环境可被快捷键实现为， { "description" : "option + n : equation" , "manipulators" : [ { "type" : "basic" , "from" : { "key_code" : "n" , "modifiers" : { "mandatory" : [ "left_option" ] } }, "to" : [ { "shell_command" : "printf '\\\\begin{equation}\\n\\n\\\\end{equation}' | pbcopy" , "hold_down_milliseconds" : 200 }, { "key_code" : "v" , "modifiers" : [ "right_command" ] }, { "key_code" : "up_arrow" } ] } ] } 此处 shell_command 可通过命令行将字符串传输给剪切板。需要注意的是：其一，字符串需要通过两次转译，例如 \begin{...}\n 在命令行中应为 \\begin{...}\n ，而在 xxx.json 中需要进一步将反斜杠进行转译，为 \\\\begin{...}\\n ；其二，为保证粘贴之前已经完成字符串的传输，需要在两个事件间用 hold_down_milliseconds 添加延迟，类似于 AutoHotkey 的函数 Sleep 。

docs.text: MkDocs 本网站由 MkDocs 生成，因此在这里给出简单介绍。使用 MkDocs，创作者可仅关注用 Markdown 语法书写的内容，无需关心 HTML, CSS 等底层细节 （实际上还是需要） 。 Commands for Mac mkdocs new [dir-name] - create a new project. mkdocs build - build the HTML files. mkdocs serve - start the live-reloading server at http://localhost:8000/ (may need sudo ). mkdocs gh-deploy --force - push to GitHub and then wait for minutes. mkdocs -h - print help message. In this page we escape these calcalutions as our inputs. Alternatively we can consider the non-perturbative properties of correlation functions. Källén–Lehmann decomposition KL decomposition is the integral transform of two-point functions with the kernel of the free two-point function. From flat to the dS case, the complete basis of energy eigenstates are replaced by the PSR basis, and in result the integral is over the principal series, \[ egin{equation} \left\langle\Omega\left|\phi(\eta, x) \phi\left(\eta^{\prime}, x^{\prime}ight)ight| \Omegaightangle=\langle\phiangle^2+\sum_{\ell} \int  rac{d \Delta}{2 \pi i}  rac{1}{N(\Delta, \ell)} \int  rac{d^d k}{(2 \pi)^d}\langle\Omega|\phi(\eta, x)| \Delta, kangle_{\mu_1 \ldots \mu_{\ell}}^{\mu_1 \ldots \mu_{\ell}}\left\langle\Delta, k\left|\phi\left(\eta^{\prime}, x^{\prime}ight)ight| \Omegaightangle \end{equation}\] and it can be collected into \[ egin{equation} \left\langle\Omega\left|\phi(\eta, x) \phi\left(\eta^{\prime}, x^{\prime}ight)ight| \Omegaightangle=\langle\phiangle^2+\int_{\mathbb{R}}  rac{d

Hermiticity of \( \) implies \(ho_\phi(\Delta)^*=ho_\phi\left(\Delta^*ight)\) . Boundary operators from the late-time expansion for a UV-complete QFT defined as a relevant deformation of a UV CFT, the space of local operators is the one of the UV CFT. for local CFTs the content of local operator should not depend on the background geometry. for local CFTs on flat spacetime with boundaries, the local operators can be expanded as boundary local operators. Using the shadow symmetry of the free two-point function, the KL decomposition can be written as \[ egin{equation} \left\langle\Omega\left|\phi(\eta, x) \phi\left(\eta^{\prime}, x^{\prime}ight)ight| \Omegaightangle=\langle\phiangle^2+\int_{ rac{d}{2}-i \infty}^{ rac{d}{2}+i \infty}  rac{d \Delta}{2 \pi i} ho_\phi(\Delta) g(\Delta) \psi_{\Delta}(\xi) \end{equation}\] then we want to closen the contour from the principal series to the right infinity, picking up the contributions from poles. uight)\) contains the information of the Plancherel measure, which cancels the poles in \(g(\Delta)\) . \(ho_\phi\left( rac{d}{2}+i 
uight)\) can be analytically continued to the right with suitable decay, and the simple poles are denoted as \[ egin{equation} ho_\phi(\Delta) \underset{\Delta ightarrow \Delta_*}{\sim}  rac{\operatorname{Res} ho_\phi\left(\Delta_*ight)}{\Delta-\Delta_*}, \quad \operatorname{Re}\left(\Delta_*ight)>d / 2 . \end{equation}\] Now closing the contour and get \[ egin{equation} \left\langle\Omega\left|\phi(\eta, x) \phi\left(\eta, x^{\prime}ight)ight| \Omegaightangle \underset{\eta ightarrow 0^{-}}{\sim}\left\langle\phi^2ightangle-\sum_{\Delta_*} \operatorname{Res} ho_\phi\left(\Delta_*ight) \mathrm{g}\left(\Delta_*ight)\left( rac{-2 \eta}{\left|x-x^{\prime}ight|}ight)^{2 \Delta_*}+\ldots \end{equation}\] comparing with the late-time expansion \[ egin{equation} \left\langle\Omega\left|\phi(\eta, x) \phi\left(\eta, x^{\prime}ight)ight| \Omegaightangle \underset{\eta ightarrow 0^{-}}{\sim}\left\langle\phi^2ightangle+\sum_k\left(b_{\phi k}ight)^2\left( rac{-\eta}{\left|x-x^{\prime}ight|}ight)^{2 \Delta_k}+\ldots \end{equation}\] we get the relation between one-point coefficients and the spectral density, \[ egin{equation} \left(b_{\phi k}ight)^2=-4^{\Delta_k} \mathrm{~g}\left(\Delta_kight) \operatorname{Res} ho_\phi\left(\Delta_kight) \end{equation}\]

u)}{2^6 \pi^{ rac{d}{2}+3} \Gamma\left( rac{d}{2}ight)}  rac{\Gamma^2\left( rac{\Delta}{2}ight) \Gamma^2\left( rac{d-\Delta}{2}ight)}{\Gamma(\Delta) \Gamma(d-\Delta)} \Gamma\left( rac{2 \Delta_\phi+\Delta-d}{2}ight) \Gamma\left( rac{2 \Delta_\phi-\Delta}{2}ight) \Gamma\left( rac{d-2 \Delta_\phi+\Delta}{2}ight) \Gamma\left( rac{2 d-2 \Delta_\phi-\Delta}{2}ight) \end{equation}\] contains three types of simple poles \[ egin{equation} \Delta=2 \Delta_\phi+2 \mathbb{N}, \quad \Delta=2\left(d-\Delta_\phiight)+2 \mathbb{N} \quad 	ext { and } \quad \Delta=d+2 \mathbb{N} \end{equation}\] corresponding to \[ egin{equation} \mathcal{O} \square^n \mathcal{O}, \quad \mathcal{O}^{\dagger} \square^n \mathcal{O}^{\dagger} \quad 	ext { and } \quad \mathcal{O}^{\dagger} \square^n \mathcal{O}+\mathcal{O} \square^n \mathcal{O}^{\dagger} \end{equation}\] which justifies the structure of MFT.
docs.title: Free massive scalar

docs.text: The two-point function of \(\f_{\d},\, \d \geq (d − 1)/2\) in CFT on dS is \[\begin{equation} G_\delta(\xi)=\frac{1}{2^\delta} \xi^\delta \end{equation}\] The spectral density \[\begin{equation} \rho_\delta(\Delta)=\frac{2^{d+2-\delta} \pi^{(d+1) / 2}}{\Gamma(\delta) \Gamma\left(\delta-\frac{d}{2}+\frac{1}{2}\right)} \nu \sinh (\pi \nu) \Gamma(\delta-\Delta) \Gamma(\delta-d+\Delta) \end{equation}\] contains poles at \[\begin{equation} \Delta=\delta+\mathbb{N} \end{equation}\] The symmetry of CFT on dS is enhanced to \(\wave{SO}(d+1,2)\) . The late-time expansion can be derived by expanding \(\f_{\d}(\eta,x)\) on the slice \(\eta=0\) , and the summation counts the order of \(\eta\) -derivatives of \(\f_{\d}(\eta,x)\) , and the primaries on constant \(\eta\) form a series \(\Delta=\delta+\mathbb{N}\) . This corresponds to decompose the rep of \(\wave{SO}(d+1,2)\) into \(SO(d+1,1)\) .
docs.title: CFT on dS

docs.text: From the late-time expansion we get a set of boundary operators, transforming as the primary operators in CFT, and the correlation functions of this set can define a CFT on the future infinity. This CFT lacks features of flat-space CFT, e.g. the existence of SOC and the convergence of OPE, and there is no local stress-energy tensor in the operator spectrum. To test the proterties of this fictitious CFT, we can extract the dynamical informations from the four-point functions. Recall the conformal partial wave expansion is \[\begin{equation} \left\langle\mathcal{O}_1 \mathcal{O}_2 \mathcal{O}_3 \mathcal{O}_4\right\rangle=\sum_{\ell} \int_{\frac{d}{2}}^{\frac{d}{2}+i \infty} \frac{d \Delta}{2 \pi i} I_{\Delta, \ell} \Psi_{\Delta, \ell}^{\Delta_i}\left(x_i\right)+\left\langle\mathcal{O}_1 \mathcal{O}_2\right\rangle\left\langle\mathcal{O}_3 \mathcal{O}_4\right\rangle \end{equation}\] where \(\Psi_{\Delta, \ell}^{\Delta_i}\left(x_i\right)\) is the conformal partial wave, \[\begin{equation} \Psi_{\Delta, \ell}^{\Delta i}\left(x_i\right):=\int d^d x\left\langle\mathcal{O}_1\left(x_1\right) \mathcal{O}_2\left(x_2\right) \mathcal{O}_{\mu_1 \ldots \mu_{\ell}}(x)\right\rangle\left\langle\tilde{\mathcal{O}}^{\mu_1 \ldots \mu_{\ell}}(x) \mathcal{O}_3\left(x_3\right) \mathcal{O}_4\left(x_4\right)\right\rangle \end{equation}\] which is orthogonal and complete, \[\begin{equation} \int \frac{d^d x_1 \ldots d^d x_4}{\operatorname{vol}(\operatorname{SO}(d+1,1))} \Psi_{\Delta, \ell}^{\Delta_i}\left(x_i\right) \Psi_{\tilde{\Delta}^{\prime}, \ell^{\prime}}^{\tilde{\Delta}_i}\left(x_i\right)=2 \pi n_{\Delta, \ell} \delta_{\ell, \ell^{\prime}} \delta\left(\nu-\nu^{\prime}\right) \end{equation}\] Due to the fact that the operators always come in pair (from the unitarity in the dS bulk), the inversion function satisfies certain positivity condition, \[\begin{equation} I_{\Delta, \ell} \geq 0 \quad \text { if }: \quad \mathcal{O}_1=\mathcal{O}_3^{\dagger} \quad \text { and } \quad \mathcal{O}_2=\mathcal{O}_4^{\dagger} \end{equation}\] \[\begin{equation} \bar{I}_{\Delta, \ell} \equiv I_{\Delta, \ell}(-1)^{\ell} \geq 0 \quad \text { if }: \quad \mathcal{O}_1=\mathcal{O}_4^{\dagger} \quad \text { and } \quad \mathcal{O}_2=\mathcal{O}_3^{\dagger} \end{equation}\]
docs.title: Higher-point functions

docs.text: The inversion function of four-point function is \[\begin{equation} \begin{aligned} \left\langle\mathcal{O}_1 \mathcal{O}_2^{\dagger} \mathcal{O}_3^{\dagger} \mathcal{O}_4\right\rangle_{\mathrm{MFT}} &=\left\langle\mathcal{O}_1 \mathcal{O}_2^{\dagger}\right\rangle\left\langle\mathcal{O}_3^{\dagger} \mathcal{O}_4\right\rangle+\left\langle\mathcal{O}_1 \mathcal{O}_4\right\rangle\left\langle\mathcal{O}_2^{\dagger} \mathcal{O}_3^{\dagger}\right\rangle+\left\langle\mathcal{O}_1 \mathcal{O}_3^{\dagger}\right\rangle\left\langle\mathcal{O}_2^{\dagger} \mathcal{O}_4\right\rangle \\ &=\left\langle\mathcal{O}_1 \mathcal{O}_2^{\dagger}\right\rangle\left\langle\mathcal{O}_3^{\dagger} \mathcal{O}_4\right\rangle+\sum_{\ell} \int_{\frac{d}{2}}^{\frac{d}{2}+i \infty} \frac{d \Delta}{2 \pi i} I_{\Delta, \ell}^{\mathrm{MFT}} \Psi_{\Delta, \ell}^{\Delta_i}\left(x_i\right)+\sum_{\ell} \int_{\frac{d}{2}}^{\frac{d}{2}+i \infty} \frac{d \Delta}{2 \pi i} I_{\Delta, \ell}^\delta \Psi_{\Delta, \ell}^{\Delta_i}\left(x_i\right) \end{aligned} \end{equation}\] The contribution of the second term is \[\begin{equation} I_{\Delta, \ell}^{\mathrm{MFT}}=(-1)^{\ell} \frac{2^{\ell-1} \Gamma\left(\ell+\frac{d}{2}\right)}{\pi^{\frac{d}{2}} \Gamma(\ell+1)} \frac{\Gamma(i \mu) \Gamma(-i \mu)}{\Gamma\left(\frac{d}{2}+i \mu\right) \Gamma\left(\frac{d}{2}-i \mu\right)} \frac{\Gamma(\Delta-1) \Gamma(d-\Delta-1) \Gamma(\Delta+\ell) \Gamma(d-\Delta+\ell)}{\Gamma\left(\Delta-\frac{d}{2}\right) \Gamma\left(-\Delta+\frac{d}{2}\right) \Gamma(\Delta+\ell-1) \Gamma(d-\Delta+\ell-1)} . \end{equation}\] which violates the positivity condition at odd spins.
docs.title: MFT

docs.text: A more careful calculation gives \[\begin{equation} \langle\phi(\eta, x) \phi(\eta, y)\rangle \underset{\eta \rightarrow 0^{-}}{\sim}(-\eta)^{d+2 i \mu} \frac{\Gamma(-i \mu) \Gamma\left(\frac{d}{2}+i \mu\right)}{4 \pi^{\frac{d}{2}+1}} \frac{1}{|x-y|^{d+2 i \mu}}+\text { c.c. }+(-\eta)^d \frac{\operatorname{coth}(\pi \mu)}{2 \mu} \delta^d(x-y) . \end{equation}\] This can be understood from the late-time behaviour of \(\f\) \[\begin{equation} \phi(x, \eta) \underset{\eta \rightarrow 0^{-}}{\sim} b(-\eta)^{\Delta} \mathcal{O}(x)+b^*(-\eta)^{\Delta^*} \mathcal{O}(x)^{\dagger}, \quad \Delta=\frac{d}{2}+i \mu \end{equation}\] then \[\begin{equation} \langle\phi(x, \eta) \phi(y, \eta)\rangle \underset{\eta \rightarrow 0^{-}}{\sim}(-\eta)^{2 \Delta} b^2\langle\mathcal{O}(x) \mathcal{O}(y)\rangle+(-\eta)^{2 \Delta^*} b^{* 2}\left\langle\mathcal{O}^{\dagger}(x) \mathcal{O}^{\dagger}(y)\right\rangle+2(-\eta)^d|b|^2\left\langle\mathcal{O}(x) \mathcal{O}^{\dagger}(y)\right\rangle \end{equation}\] Aka, \[\begin{equation} \left\langle\mathcal{O}(x) \mathcal{O}^{\dagger}(y)\right\rangle= C \delta^d(x-y) \end{equation}\] Due to this non-vanishing two-point function, the third term in the four-point functions gives nontrivial contributions, and the result is \[\begin{equation} I_{\Delta, \ell}=I_{\Delta, \ell}^{\mathrm{MFT}}+I_{\Delta, \ell}^\delta=\left(1+(-1)^{\ell} \frac{1}{\cosh ^2(\pi \mu)}\right) I_{\Delta, \ell}^\delta . \end{equation}\] where \(I_{\Delta, \ell}^\delta\sim C^2\) is manifestly positive.
docs.title: Local terms

docs.text: Uncollected/uncorrected Word problem for finite groups Finite approximations to Lie groups Turing 的一篇有趣文章，介绍为何难以用有限群逼近 nonabelian Lie group。 An introduction to the word problem for groups Why word problems are hard 自由群的基本性质：记 \(n\) 阶自由群为 \(F_{n}\) ，生成元为 \(\set{x_1,\dots,x_n}\) 。直观上， \(F_{n}\) 是 \(n\) -穿孔平面的基本群。任何有限生成群 \(G=\vev{g_1,\dots,g_n}\) 皆可以通过同态 \(x_i\mapsto g_i\) 实现为自由群的商群。自由群的子群都是自由群 (Nielsen, Schreier).。 Lightray operators as detectors from section 2 of 2209.00008 探测算子 (detector)：局域在零无穷远的光线上的算子，因此在 bulk 中是平移不变的。 例如对于自由标量场，局域算子 \(\mathcal{O}_J=\phi \partial_{\mu_1} \cdots \partial_{\mu_J} \phi\) 在零无穷远上沿着光线的积分，引入相互作用之后， \(\op_{J}\) 重整化为 \(\op_{r,J}=Z\, \op_{J}\) ，该积分算子亦被重整化而得到反常量纲。另一种例子是光线算子，它们可具有复角动量与量纲，可通过光线变换 (lightray transform) 得到。 自由标量场中的 \(E^{J-1}\) flux 探测算子 $\mathcal{E}_J(\mathbf{n}) $ 挑出了 \(\bf{n}\) 方向上产生湮灭算子的贡献， \[\begin{equation} \mathcal{E}_J(\mathbf{n}) \propto \int_0^{\infty} d E E^{J+d-4} a^{\dagger}(E \mathbf{n}) a(E \mathbf{n}) \end{equation}\] \(J=2\) 时对全方向的积分给出 Hamiltonian，因此 \(\cE_{2}(\bf{n})\) 测量了特定方向上的 erengy flux。 \[\begin{equation} \int_{|\mathbf{n}|=1} d^{d-2} \mathbf{n} \mathcal{E}_2(\mathbf{n})=H \end{equation}\] 记未来零单位矢量为 \(z=(1,\bf{n})\) ，将 \(\cE_{2}(\bf{n})\) 协变化可得 \[\begin{equation} \mathcal{E}_J(z) \propto \int_0^{\infty} d E E^{J+d-4} a^{\dagger}(E z) a(E z) \end{equation}\] How to define path integral on \(\N\) ? The Cantor set \(C\) and the 2-adic integers are both identified as the space of functions from \(\N\) to \(\set{0,1}\) with the totally disconnected topology. Smooth functions on the Cantor set are defined as locally constant functions. Regarding \(\N\) as the base space and \(\set{0,1}\) as the target space, the integration region of path integral is the Cantor set. The path integral is \[\begin{equation} Z=\sum_{x\in C}f(x) \end{equation}\] for some Boltzmann weight \(f(x)\) . The topology of Cantor set does bookkeep the poset structure of \(\N\) . This should reflect the locality on the \(p\) -adic integers.

docs.text: Expression and evaluation I The standard evaluation sequence References: Mathematica documentation: tutorial/Evaluation , tutorial/EvaluationOfExpressions Introduction to the standard evaluation sequence. Working with unevaluated expressions Demonstrating situations in which evaluation control is important, pointing out common pitfalls and providing useful tools and techniques along the way. Materials: evaluation_1.nb Moduli It's convenient to treat a collection of similar objects as a unity, the properties of which reveal the relations between specific objects. Sometimes, the collection itself admits "nice" geometric structures, and we call it the moduli space. Borrowing the idea of differential geometry, a curve in the moduli represents an one parameter family of objects, aka, finite deformation, and the tangent space contains independent directions of infinitesimal deformations. A typical example is the moduli space of Narain CFTs 6 : tangent vectors correspond to exactly marginal operators, and measures correspond to ensembles of CFTs. In the following we will review the evaluation of expressions in Mathematica by ANALOGY with the moduli space. Expr Moduli expression x0 point \(x_{0}\) rule x0 -> x0 + f0 tangent vector \(f_{0}\) at \(x_{0}\) pattern x_ :> x + f ( x ) vector field \(f(x)\) pattern condition x_ /; Q [ x ] == 0 constraint \(Q(x)=0\) evaluation x0 -> x1 ->...-> xn flow from \(x_{0}\) to \(x_{n}\) standard evaluation sequence a special flow complexity potential neighborhood/locality ? 1 Expression 本节回顾 Mathematica 的表达式，记所有符合语法的表达式构成的集合 2 为 Expr 。在 Mathematica 中不存在明确的类型系统，一切对象皆为表达式 (expression) 4 。 表达式的结构可表示为树 (tree)，函数 TreeForm 3 给出表达式的树形式。可用 Head , Level , Position , Part , Span , Length , Depth 等函数访问表达式的内部结构。此外，函数 LeafCount 给出树的节点 (node) 或称叶子的总数，因此提供了一种表达式复杂度的度量。 原子： 与树的结构相似，不存在非平凡子表达式的称为原子 (atom)，例如数、符号、字符串。 复合： 树可以拼接，若干表达式可以复合为复杂度更高的表达式，此处复合 (composite) 指树的拼接，形如 f0 [ f1 , f2 , ... ] ，类似于 operad 5 。 合成： 树构成森林，对应于合成 (compound)，形如 f1 ; f2 ;... ，类似于张量积。 举例说明上述介绍，Witt 代数的生成元 \(L_n=x^{n+1} \p_x\) 可写为如下的纯函数， L [ n_ ] := ( x ^ ( n + 1 ) D [ # , x ]) &; 作用在函数 \(f(x)\) 上 L [ n ] @ f [ x ] ， 给出 \(x^{n+1} f'(x)\) 。 \(L_{n}\) 的树形式为 L [ n ] // TreeForm 。 Evaluation 表达式的集合 Expr 是一个无结构的平凡集合。对表达式的计算 (evaluation) 可实现表达式之间的形变 (deformation)。当然，计算类似于离散动力系统，此处并无良好定义的微分结构。 特定对象 \(x_0\) 的不同无穷小形变可记为 \(x_0 \mapsto x_0 + \d_i x_0,\, \d_i x_0\in TM_{x_0}\) ，例如有效作用量的形变为 \[\begin{equation} S_0\to S_0+\sum_i\intt{d^d x}\d g_i \op_i \end{equation}\] 形变切方向的类似物即为规则 Rule ( -> ) 。表达式的子表达式的集合可以实现为 subExpression subExpression // Attributes = { HoldFirst } ; subExpression [ expr_ , wrapper_ : HoldForm , opts : OptionsPattern []] := Cases [ Unevaluated @ expr , subexpr_ :> wrapper @ subexpr , { 0 , Infinity }, FilterRules [{ opts }, Options [ Cases ]], Heads -> False ] ; 例如 expr0 = f [ g [ h ]] 的子表达式为， expr0 = f [ g [ h ]] ; list = subExpression [ Evaluate @ expr0 ] // ReleaseHold Out [] = { h , g [ h ], f [ g [ h ]]} 由于 Expr 过大，将其简单截断为 exprlist = { x , y } 。改变表达式 expr0 的规则的集合可以实现为 exprlist = { a , b } ; rulelist = Outer [ Rule , list , exprlist ] // Flatten Out [] = { h -> a , h -> b , g [ h ] -> a , g [ h ] -> b , f [ g [ h ]] -> a , f [ g [ h ]] -> b } 函数 Replace [ expr , rule ] 会搜索 expr 中匹配 rule 的子表达式并进行替换，可实现表达式的形变， expr0 的全部形变为 1 Replace [ expr0 , # ,{ 0 , Infinity }] &/@ rulelist Out [] = { f [ g [ a ]], f [ g [ b ]], f [ a ], f [ b ], a , b } 如想仅替换 g -> a 需启用 Replace 的选项 Heads -> True ，此时 Replace 会匹配表达式中的 Head 部分。但如想实现替换 f [ g ] -> a 需要引入含有模式的延迟规则 f [ g [ x_ ]] :> a [ x ] ，此处模式 x_ 用局部变量 x 指代 Expr 中的任意一个表达式，类似于 \(\forall x\in M\) 。 Replace parts of the expression Heads->True Pattern Replace [ expr0 , g -> a ,{ 0 , Infinity }, Heads -> False ] Replace [ expr0 , g -> a ,{ 0 , Infinity }, Heads -> True ] Out [] = f [ g [ h ]] Out [] = f [ a [ h ]] Replace [ expr0 , f [ g ] -> a ,{ 0 , Infinity }, Heads -> True ] Replace [ expr0 , f [ g [ x_ ]] :> a [ x ],{ 0 , Infinity }] Out [] = f [ g [ h ]] Out [] = a [ h ] 模式 Pattern [ name , patt ] 提供了全称量词的类似物，含有模式的延迟规则 patt :> target 可作用到 Expr 中的每一个表达式上。类似于矢量场 \(f(x)\) 在 \(M\) 的每点指派无穷小形变。 \[\begin{equation} x \mapsto x+ f(x), \, \forall x\in M \end{equation}\] 需要指出的是，赋值函数 Set ( = ), SetDelayed ( := ), UpSet ( ^= ), UpSetDelayed ( ^:= ) 等的作用是在 Mathematica 的全局规则库中添加用户指定的规则。例如 f [ x_ ] := x 实际上是指定了符号 f 的下值 DownValues ， f [ x_ ] := x ; f // DownValues Out [] = { HoldPattern [ f [ x_ ]] :> x } Standard evaluation 在计算时，Mathematica 会遍历表达式 expr = f0 [ f1 , f2 , ... ] 的子结构，比对规则库进行模式匹配，重复这一步骤直到表达式的形式不变，即收敛到不动点，称之为标准计算序列 (standard evaluation sequence)： 计算表达式的 Head [ expr ] = f0 ； 依次计算子表达式 f1 , f2 , ... ； 应用符号的属性 (attribute)； 应用用户定义进行计算，即利用规则进行替换； 应用内置定义进行计算； 重复上述步骤，直到表达式不再变化或溢出。 可类比为矢量场的 flow 收敛到不动点或发散。后者例如递归溢出， Block [{ $RecursionLimit = 20 , f }, f :=- f ; Trace [ f , f ] ] // ReleaseHold 给出如下错误信息 $RecursionLimit :: reclim2 : Recursion depth of 20 exceeded during evaluation of - f . Out [] = { f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f ,{ f , - f }}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} Non-standard evaluation 计算依赖规则之间的顺序，类似于不同的矢量场不交换。因此选取合适的规则顺序方可得到目标表达式。标准计算序列在特定场景并不合适，例如上面的子表达式一例中，如果去掉 Hold 相关的部分，结果为 subExpressionUnhold [ expr_ ] := Cases [ expr , _ ,{ 0 , Infinity }] ; f = g ; subExpressionUnhold [ f [ 1 + 1 ]] subExpression [ f [ 1 + 1 ]] Out [] = { 2 , g [ 2 ]} Out [] = { 1 , 1 , 1 + 1 , f [ 1 + 1 ]} 这是因为在执行标准计算时 subExpressionUnhold 不具有 OwnValues ，因此计算 f = g ，再计算 g [ 1 + 1 ] = g [ 2 ] ，最后计算 subExpressionUnhold [ g [ 2 ]] = { 2 , g [ 2 ]} 。而带有 HoldFirst 属性的 subExpression 会保持输入 f [ 1 + 1 ] 不变，直接匹配 subExpression 的下值。 Mathematica 提供了若干调整计算顺序的内置函数，此时称之为非标准计算 (non-standard evaluation)，例如 Hold family: Names [ "System`*Hold*" ] Out [] = { Hold , HoldAll , HoldAllComplete , HoldComplete , HoldFirst , HoldForm , HoldPattern , HoldRest , NHoldAll , NHoldFirst , NHoldRest , ReleaseHold , SequenceHold , $ConditionHold } Evaluate vs. Unevaluated : only effect the most outer level Inactive , Inactivate , Activate , IgnoringInactive : inactivate centain symbols as if with no definitions. Verbatim : used in matching rules themselves. 在下一篇中，我们会着重讲解这些非标准计算函数的应用。 Neighborhood: why use Plus in x0 -> x0 + f0 since there is no notion of linearity? How to tell whether two expressions are close enough? In this example, f [ g [ a ]] is certainly closer to f [ g [ h ]] than f [ a ] , and how to elaborate? (May with the help of the topology of expression trees?) ↩ ↩ The "size" of Expr is controlled by two objects: the collection of valid trees and the collection of node indices. Nodes can be atomic or non-atomic, e.g. f [ x ] vs. ( f + g )[ x ] . ↩ or the functions ExpressionTree and ExpressionGraph , see the Mathematica documentation: guide/Trees . ↩ At the core of the Wolfram Language is the foundational idea that everything - data, programs, formulas, graphics, documents - can be represented as symbolic expressions. And it is this unifying concept that underlies the Wolfram Language's symbolic programming paradigm, and makes possible much of the unique power of the Wolfram Language and the Wolfram System. -- Mathematica documentation: guide/Expressions ↩ A mild introduction to operads @math3ma.com . ↩ Alexander Maloney and Edward Witten. Averaging over Narain moduli space. JHEP , 10:187, 2020. arXiv:2006.04855 , doi:10.1007/JHEP10(2020)187 . ↩
docs.title: Expression and evaluation I

docs.text: It's convenient to treat a collection of similar objects as a unity, the properties of which reveal the relations between specific objects. Sometimes, the collection itself admits "nice" geometric structures, and we call it the moduli space. Borrowing the idea of differential geometry, a curve in the moduli represents an one parameter family of objects, aka, finite deformation, and the tangent space contains independent directions of infinitesimal deformations. A typical example is the moduli space of Narain CFTs 6 : tangent vectors correspond to exactly marginal operators, and measures correspond to ensembles of CFTs. In the following we will review the evaluation of expressions in Mathematica by ANALOGY with the moduli space. Expr Moduli expression x0 point \(x_{0}\) rule x0 -> x0 + f0 tangent vector \(f_{0}\) at \(x_{0}\) pattern x_ :> x + f ( x ) vector field \(f(x)\) pattern condition x_ /; Q [ x ] == 0 constraint \(Q(x)=0\) evaluation x0 -> x1 ->...-> xn flow from \(x_{0}\) to \(x_{n}\) standard evaluation sequence a special flow complexity potential neighborhood/locality ? 1

docs.text: 本节回顾 Mathematica 的表达式，记所有符合语法的表达式构成的集合 2 为 Expr 。在 Mathematica 中不存在明确的类型系统，一切对象皆为表达式 (expression) 4 。 表达式的结构可表示为树 (tree)，函数 TreeForm 3 给出表达式的树形式。可用 Head , Level , Position , Part , Span , Length , Depth 等函数访问表达式的内部结构。此外，函数 LeafCount 给出树的节点 (node) 或称叶子的总数，因此提供了一种表达式复杂度的度量。 原子： 与树的结构相似，不存在非平凡子表达式的称为原子 (atom)，例如数、符号、字符串。 复合： 树可以拼接，若干表达式可以复合为复杂度更高的表达式，此处复合 (composite) 指树的拼接，形如 f0 [ f1 , f2 , ... ] ，类似于 operad 5 。 合成： 树构成森林，对应于合成 (compound)，形如 f1 ; f2 ;... ，类似于张量积。 举例说明上述介绍，Witt 代数的生成元 \(L_n=x^{n+1} \p_x\) 可写为如下的纯函数， L [ n_ ] := ( x ^ ( n + 1 ) D [ # , x ]) &; 作用在函数 \(f(x)\) 上 L [ n ] @ f [ x ] ， 给出 \(x^{n+1} f'(x)\) 。 \(L_{n}\) 的树形式为 L [ n ] // TreeForm 。

docs.text: 表达式的集合 Expr 是一个无结构的平凡集合。对表达式的计算 (evaluation) 可实现表达式之间的形变 (deformation)。当然，计算类似于离散动力系统，此处并无良好定义的微分结构。 特定对象 \(x_0\) 的不同无穷小形变可记为 \(x_0 \mapsto x_0 + \d_i x_0,\, \d_i x_0\in TM_{x_0}\) ，例如有效作用量的形变为 \[\begin{equation} S_0\to S_0+\sum_i\intt{d^d x}\d g_i \op_i \end{equation}\] 形变切方向的类似物即为规则 Rule ( -> ) 。表达式的子表达式的集合可以实现为 subExpression subExpression // Attributes = { HoldFirst } ; subExpression [ expr_ , wrapper_ : HoldForm , opts : OptionsPattern []] := Cases [ Unevaluated @ expr , subexpr_ :> wrapper @ subexpr , { 0 , Infinity }, FilterRules [{ opts }, Options [ Cases ]], Heads -> False ] ; f // DownValues Out [] = { HoldPattern [ f [ x_ ]] :> x }

docs.text: 非交换代数 References: ​ 介绍 本文介绍用 Mathematica 实现非交换代数的计算，例如 Lie algebra, quantum group 及其表示。首先看一个来自于 Y system 的简单例子：restricted Y system of \(A_1\) at level 2 1 , \[\begin{align} Y_m(u+1) Y_m(u-1)&=\left(1+Y_{m-1}(u)\right)\left(1+Y_{m+1}(u)\right) \qfor m=1, \dots , l-1\\ Y_m(u)&=0 \qfor m \leq 0 \qor m \geq l \end{align}\] 满足下述关系 \[\begin{equation} Y_m(u+l+2)=Y_{l-m}(u) \end{equation}\] 关于 Y system 和 T system 的介绍可见文献 2 ，这里我们的。 ↩ Atsuo Kuniba, Tomoki Nakanishi, and Junji Suzuki. T-systems and Y-systems in integrable systems. J. Phys. A , 44:103001, 2011. arXiv:1010.1344 , doi:10.1088/1751-8113/44/10/103001 . ↩

docs.text: 本文介绍用 Mathematica 实现非交换代数的计算，例如 Lie algebra, quantum group 及其表示。首先看一个来自于 Y system 的简单例子：restricted Y system of \(A_1\) at level 2 1 , \[\begin{align} Y_m(u+1) Y_m(u-1)&=\left(1+Y_{m-1}(u)\right)\left(1+Y_{m+1}(u)\right) \qfor m=1, \dots , l-1\\ Y_m(u)&=0 \qfor m \leq 0 \qor m \geq l \end{align}\] 满足下述关系 \[\begin{equation} Y_m(u+l+2)=Y_{l-m}(u) \end{equation}\] 关于 Y system 和 T system 的介绍可见文献 2 ，这里我们的。 ↩ Atsuo Kuniba, Tomoki Nakanishi, and Junji Suzuki. T-systems and Y-systems in integrable systems. J. Phys. A , 44:103001, 2011. arXiv:1010.1344 , doi:10.1088/1751-8113/44/10/103001 . ↩

docs.text: 市面上能找到的Lie algebra package 多数是针对semisimple Lie algebra 特化的， SuperLie package 看起来可以实现我们需要的功能，有兴趣的小伙伴可以尝试一下。在 Headrick的Virasoro algebra notebook 基础上，我们可以总结出两种方法加载代数关系，其一是他采用的延迟赋值SetDelayed，其二是ReplaceRepeated，根据MMA自带的文档，前者在计算中实际上就是采用了后者。我个人的经验是后者计算更加可控。 MMA提供了非交换乘法函数 NonCommutativeMultiply，它的中缀符号是 ，内置的属性(attributes)为， In[]:= NonCommutativeMultiply // Attributes Out[]= {Flat, OneIdentity, Protected} 其中flat 即结合律，它会自动摊平所有的括号。注意我们对于Lie algebra \mathfrak{g} 和其weight module的计算是在universal enveloping algebra U(\mathfrak{g}) 中进行的，quantum group 可以粗糙的理解为U(\mathfrak{g}) 的形变，这些例子遵循结合律。修改属性的函数是SetAttributes和ClearAttributes。方便起见，我们添加Listable属性， Unprotect[NonCommutativeMultiply]; SetAttributes[NonCommutativeMultiply,Listable]; 接下来自然的问题是，什么表达式是非交换的？我们用一个列表algebraOperator来存储非交换的算子，然后用FreeQ来判定一个表达式是交换的标量(C-number)还是算子(Q-number)， ( 声明代数 ) algebraOperator={}; ( 判断是否为通常的C-number ) cnumberQ[expr_]:=And@@(FreeQ[expr,#]&/@algebraOperator); 这里#和& 是MMA的纯函数写法，/@是Map，不熟悉的读者可以直接跳过，接受cnumberQ[expr]当expr是C-number时返回True即可。 我们可以指定一系列规则来加载非交换乘法的关系，然后用函数ReplaceRepeated进行化简。在此之前，非交换乘法需要满足标量乘法和分配律，在一些应用中需要定义算子的共轭或者类似的anti-involution，这些基础规则不依赖具体的代数。用列表algebraRelationInternal来存储以上基本规则，把用户可操作的代数规则存储到列表algebraRelation中，把所有的规则存储在列表algebraRelationAll中， algebraRelation={}; ( 用algebraRelationInternal来隐藏基本规则 ) algebraRelationInternal=basicAlgebraRelation~Join~basicConjugationRelation; Protect[algebraRelationInternal]; ( 初始化algebraRelationAll ) algebraRelationAll=algebraRelationInternal; basicAlgebraRelation={ x_ y_:>x y/;cnumberQ[x]||cnumberQ[y], (x_?cnumberQ y_) z_:>x y z, x_ (y_?cnumberQ z_):>y x z, (x_+y_) z_:>x z+y z, x_ (y_+z_):>x y+x z }; basicConjugationRelation={ conjugate[x_ y_]:>conjugate[y]**conjugate[x], conjugate[x_+y_]:>conjugate[x]+conjugate[y], conjugate[x_ y_]:>conjugate[x]conjugate[y], conjugate[x_?cnumberQ]:>Conjugate[x] }; 然后定义一个函数封装ReplaceRepeated（//.是其后缀写法）， algebraSimplify[x_]:=x//.algebraRelationAll//Simplify; SetAttributes[algebraSimplify,Listable]; 为了使计算结果可读，我们可以定义额外的打印规则， algebraPrintRule={}; algebraPrint[x_]:=x//.algebraPrintRule; SetAttributes[algebraPrint,Listable]; 最后是列表操作函数，用来添加和清除规则， addOperator; addRelation; addPrintRule; clearOperator; clearRelation; clearPrintRule; clearAlgebra; 以及一些其他常用函数， commutator; jacobiIdentity; adjoint; Adjoint; innerProduct; 为了保证ReplaceRepeated的结果收敛，我们需要确定最后表达式中算子的优先级，定义一个Lie algebra上的序关系，即根据Poincaré–Birkhoff–Witt定理，挑出一组universal enveloping algebra中的基。 例子1：以Virasoro algebra为例，我们指定算子 L_n ，以及一些态， {L, vac, primary, descendant} // addOperator 然后把下标大的交换到右边， {L[n_] L[m_] :> L[m] L[n] + (n - m) L[n + m] + If[n + m == 0, c1 (n^3 - n)/12 , 0] /; n > m, } // addRelation {L[n_] :> Superscript[Subscript[L, n], 1], Superscript[Subscript[op_, n_], a_] ** Superscript[Subscript[op_, n_], b_] :> Superscript[Subscript[op, n], a + b]} // addPrintRule 这样便完成了基本的定义。例如计算 [L_1,L_{-1}^{4}]=12 L_{-1}^{3}+8L_{-1}^{3} L_0 ， n = 4; comm[L[1], Lconst[-1, n]] // algebraPrint n =. ​ 编辑 添加图片注释，不超过 140 字（可选） 例子2：产生湮灭算子， {a, ad, vac} // addOperator {a[p_] ad[q_] :> ad[q] a[p] + DiracDelta[p - q], a[p_] ** vac :> 0 } // addRelation; {ad[p_] :> Superscript[Subscript[a, p], [Dagger]], a[p_] :> Subscript[a, p]} // addPrintRule; hamiltonian[p_] := ad[p] a[p] p^2/(2 M) Hamiltonian作用到双粒子态上给出能量之和， hamiltonian[p] ad[p1] ad[p2] vac // algebraSimplify // algebraPrint

Paclet and package development 扩展包结构可概括为： p.wl (*用Get强制重新读取扩展包p0.wl...*) Get /@ { "p0`" , ... } (*设定$Context为p`，Needs扩展包p1.wl...*) BeginPackage [ "p`" ,{ "p1`" , ... }] ; (*重载扩展包时清除上次的定义*) dataDelete [ "..." ] ; (*from lily`list`*) Unprotect @@ Names [ "p`*" ] ; ClearAll @@ Names [ "p`*" ] ; (*声明公共函数*) foo :: usage = "" ; (*设定$Context为p`Private`*) Begin [ "`Private`" ] ; (*函数定义*) foo = ...; (*结束当前$Context，恢复为p`*) End [] ; (*保护所有未指名的符号*) protectAllExcept [ "foo1" ] ; (*恢复$Context，并添加p`至$ContextPath*) EndPackage [] ; Some tips Function type 常数 (constant)，存储变量的列表以及列表操作函数； 判别函数 (questing function)，用以界定变量的类型和范围，因此定义尽量完备； 主体函数 (body function)，实现该扩展包的各种功能。为防止意外计算，需要定义再去定义，遵循自上到下的书写规则； 打印函数 (format)，区分返回值和打印，分离函数之间传递的值和输出结果。 Naming 同一类功能的函数以相同的前缀命名。 判别函数的命名后缀为 Q 。 局部变量的名称为小写字母，全局变量 foo 的局部拷贝命名为 $$foo ，重复模式的名称为单词复数 foos__ ，列表模式的名称为 foolist_ ，helper 函数命名为 foo`foo1 。 Others Decoupling 减少复杂的不同功能的函数、不同扩展包之间的关联。 Helper functions 复杂的主体函数应分层，最外层提供用户接口，若干内层的 helper 函数实现不同功能，尽可能使函数的依赖关系为 tree-like 的结构，为了避免重复判定条件，仅在最外层使用判别函数。 Functions with attributes HoldAll 如无必要，不使用 HoldAll 等属性，以防阻止期待的计算。 Sub-packages and auto-completion 子扩展包的自动补全问题：母扩展包 p` 下的子扩展包 p`p1` 中的公共函数不会被自动补全。可见讨论 Sub-packages and auto-completion 。 解决方案：将母扩展包解耦并重命名为 p0` ，在 p0` 中启用子扩展包 p`p1` 。 OwnValues is bad 公共符号应避免使用 OwnValues : foo =... 而使用 foo [] =... 。 Dummy rules ReplaceAll 访问表达式的策略是自上到下的，匹配完的子表达式不再被匹配，因此：一方面，规则 { x_foo :> x , ... } 可以防止 Head 为 foo 的子表达式被匹配，称为哑规则；另一方面，其余的规则应避免此类不改变表达式的行为，以防止子表达式被遮蔽。 Package dependency lily`lily # initialization lily`xact # initialization lily`feyn # initialization lily`temp # working region Package lily`lily classDiagram list <.. algebra list <.. index base <.. test base <.. IO base <.. temp MaTeX <.. latex class base{ <<custom, debug>> xxQ() } class temp{ <<workbench>> } class IO{ <<input, 
 output>> IO() } class test{ <<unit test>> test() week() virtual() } class list{ <<data>> data(type,member) member() } class algebra{ <<associative 
 algebra>> operator relation printing } class index{ <<indexed 
 objexts>> variable label } class number{ <<number field>> } class MaTeX{ <<latex 
 compiling>> } class latex{ <<latex 
 compiling>> } class matrix{ <<matrix,
 operator>> } class simplify{ <<expression 
 simplification>> together() apart() } class lie{ <<Lie alg>> } class IBP{ <<integration 
 by parts>> IBP() } Package lily`xact (unfinished) classDiagram class xCore{ <<debug tools>> } class xPerm{ <<permutation 
 manipulation>> } class xTensor{ <<abstract tensor 
 computations>> } class xCoba{ <<component tensor 
 computations>> } class xPert{ <<component tensor 
 computations>> } class TexAct{ <<latex format>> } class MaTeX{ latex compiling }

docs.text: 本文考虑的标量场的作用量为 \[\begin{equation} S=\frac{1}{2}\int\,{d^{d}x}\sqrt{-g}\,( \partial^{a}\phi \partial_{a}\phi + c R \phi^2) \end{equation}\] 选取合适的系数 \(c=\frac{d-2}{4(d-1)}\) 后，修正项 \(R \phi^2\) 可使作用量在 Weyl 变换下不变，因此能动张量 \(T_{ab}=\frac{2}{\sqrt{-g}} \frac{\delta S}{\delta g^{ab}}\) 的迹为零 \(\trace{T}=0\) ，该理论称为共形标量场 (conformal scalar)。 电磁场的作用量为 \[\begin{equation} S=\frac{1}{4}\int\,{d^{d}x}\sqrt{-g}\,F_{ab}F^{ab} \end{equation}\] 且有 \(\trace{T}= -\frac{d-4}{4}F^{2}\) 。事实上，仅当 \(d=4\) 时，自由电磁场具有共形对称性。 相关讨论可见文献 3 4 5 6 7 8 。
docs.title: 背景

docs.text: 变分计算问题回到最底层，是遵循一系列规则依照一定次序化简表达式，逐步降低表达式的复杂度，最后抵达目标表达式。 这是一个代数问题，不需要指明场构型在哪一个函数空间中，不需要流形的整体信息，不必明确是何种意义的积分 1 。我们所需的只是一个坐标卡内的局部结构，例如微分、度规、复结构。这个坐标卡可以是欧氏空间的开集，可以是超空间的开集，或者来自于某种形式几何 2 。 那么直接的实现方案是利用 Mathematica 的核心功能： Rule 和 Replace ，相关介绍可见文章 Expression and evaluation I 。如果想重复利用代码，需要明确各个对象之间的派生关系，例如：某张量场是在某坐标卡上的，某联络的某一项是关于某纤维丛的。xAct 提供了相应的完整平台。 我们需要调用的扩展包和预定义的函数如下： Package loading and pre-defined functions Packages Functions Notation`AutoLoadNotationPalette = False ; packageListxAct = { "xAct`xPerm`" , "xAct`xTensor`" , "xAct`xPert`" , "xAct`Invar`" , "xAct`xCoba`" , "xAct`SymManipulator`" , "xAct`xTras`" , "xAct`TexAct`" } ; (*隐藏导入时打印的版本信息*) Block [ { Print }, Get /@ packageListxAct ] ; (*隐藏局部变量的$符号*) $PrePrint = ScreenDollarIndices ; (*定义某些对象后xAct会打印相关信息，可隐藏*) $DefInfoQ = False ; $CVVerbose = False ; SetOptions [ AutomaticRules , Verbose -> False ] ; (*以前缀运算符的形式打印协变导数*) $CovDFormat = "Prefix" ; ruled1 :: usage = "" ; measure :: usage = "Sqrt[-g]" ; tensorSim :: usage = "x//ContractMetric//Simplification" ; tensorCollect :: usage = "Collect[x,$PerturbationParameter,tensorSim]" ; tensorIndexed :: usage = "to index a tensor by the alphabet" ; (*有时计算结果会包含一个delta符号，可用如下规则消除*) ruled1 = { delta [ - LI [ 1 ], LI [ 1 ]] -> 1 } ; (*measure[metric_]返回度规行列式的平方根*) measure [ met_ ? MetricQ ] := Sqrt [ - ToExpression [ "Det" <> ToString @ met <> "[]" ]] ; (*常用的预定义函数*) tensorSim [ x_ ] := x // ContractMetric // Simplification ; tensorCollect [ x_ ] := Collect [ x , $PerturbationParameter , tensorSim ] ; (*赋予已声明的张量场以默认的指标*) tensorIndexed [ field1_ , field2_ ? xTensorQ ] := Module [ { slots , tangent , variablelist }, slots = SlotsOfTensor [ field2 ] ; tangent = TangentBundleOfManifold @@ DependenciesOfTensor @ field2 ; variablelist = Table [ slots [[ ind ]] /. Thread [ tangent -> IndicesOfVBundle [ tangent ][[ 1 ]] ][[ ind ]], { ind , 1 , Length @ slots } ] ; field1 @@ variablelist ] ; tensorIndexed [ field_ ] := tensorIndexed [ field , field ] ; 变分计算可以分为三步：写下作用量；对场量变分；分部积分化简表达式。
docs.title: 导言

docs.text: 我们先声明流形、度规和 Levi-Civita 联络，号差为 \((-,+,+,...)\) 。函数 DefManifold 可声明流形，其三个参数分别为流形的名称、维数与指标集合。注意 xAct 会自动声明切丛以及相关的张量丛。类似的，声明度规的函数为 DefMetric 。 (*dim为xAct的预定常量，打印为d*) (*函数IndexRange指定了所有英文字母为抽象指标*) DefManifold [ M , dim , IndexRange [ a , z ]] ; (*第一个变量是度规行列式的符号*) (*下指标用负号标记，xAct自动定义适配的Levi-Civita联络，SymbolOfCovD和PrintAs是打印规则*) DefMetric [ - 1 , metric [ - a , - b ], CD , SymbolOfCovD -> { ";" , "\[Del]" }, PrintAs -> "g" ] ; (*打印Riemann张量为R，此处需用UpSet*) PrintAs [ RiemannCD ] ^= "R" ; PrintAs [ RicciCD ] ^= "R" ; PrintAs [ RicciScalarCD ] ^= "R" ; 在声明完度规 metric 后，xAct 会自动声明 Detmetric [] 为附着 metric 的度规行列式 \(\sqrt{-g}\) 。方便起见引入函数 measure ， measure [ metric ] = Detmetric [] 。 声明常量 \(c\) 、标量场 \(\phi\) 、电磁场 \(A_{a}\) 与 \(F_{ab}\) ， DefConstantSymbol [ cs , PrintAs -> "c" ] ; DefTensor [ phi [], M , PrintAs -> "\[Phi]" ] ; DefTensor [ A [ - a ], M ] ; DefTensor [ F [ - a , - b ], M , Antisymmetric [{ - a , - b }]] ; 场强和规范势需满足规则 \(F_{ab}=\partial_{[a}A_{b]}\) ，xAct 提供了类似 Rule 的函数 MakeRule ，以及类似 SetDelayed 的函数 IndexSetDelayed ， ? MakeRule ? IndexSetDelayed MakeRule[{LHS, RHS}] gives a list of delayed rules with left and right hand sides as given by LHS and RHS respectively, but moving indices to consider all possible equivalent rules. See notes for its options PatternIndices, MetricOn, UseSymmetries and TestIndices. MakeRule[{LHS, RHS, conditions}] adds conditions to the rules. IndexSet[lhs, rhs] defines a relation between indexed expressions lhs and rhs, without evaluating rhs. 这里我们选用 MakeRule ，更方便控制计算。注意与 Rule 不同， MakeRule 不需要使用模式。场强转化为规范势的规则为 ruleFToA = MakeRule [{ F [ a , b ], CD [ a ] @ A [ b ] - CD [ b ] @ A [ a ]}, MetricOn -> All ] ; 接下来定义 Lagrangian density，以下混称作用量， \[\begin{align} \cL_{\f}={}&\tfrac{1}{2} (- \overset{\overset{~}{~}}{g})^{1/2} (c \phi^2 R + \nabla_{a}\phi \nabla^{a}\phi)\\ \cL_{A}={}&\tfrac{1}{4} (- \overset{\overset{~}{~}}{g})^{1/2} F_{ab} F^{ab}. \end{align}\] action [ phi ] = 1 / 2 ( CD [ a ] @ phi [] CD [ - a ] @ phi [] + cs RicciScalarCD [] phi [] ^ 2 ) measure [ metric ] ; action [ A ] = 1 / 4 F [ - a , - b ] F [ a , b ] measure [ metric ] ; 如此便完成了准备工作。
